/usr/bin/g++-13 -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/cache_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/memory_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/resp_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/mysql_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/persistence_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/consistent_hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis.dir/src/http_stats.cpp.o -o miniredis  -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlclient.so
